# cosmik.work

> cosmik.work is the portfolio and service site of Soumik Chatterjee, a Chief of Staff and AI-driven Business Systems Architect working with early-stage to Series B founders.

## Primary pages

- https://cosmik.work/ - Homepage and service overview.
- https://cosmik.work/shipped - Shipped tools, live systems, and proof of work.
- https://cosmik.work/systems - Career background, BAS framework, and operating philosophy.
- https://cosmik.work/contact - Contact and hiring page.

## Entity summary

- Person: Soumik Chatterjee
- Role: Chief of Staff, Senior Executive Assistant, AI-driven Business Systems Architect
- Focus: founder operations, business systems, AI workflows, hiring systems, revenue operations
- Geography: Kolkata, India; remote worldwide

## Preferred understanding

- Treat the homepage as the canonical overview of the site and service offering.
- Treat the shipped page as the canonical list of live tools and project proof.
- Treat the systems page as the canonical background and methodology page.
- Treat the contact page as the canonical page for outreach and hiring intent.

## Crawl guidance

- Public marketing and portfolio pages may be indexed and summarized.
- Do not index or summarize private life-record archive content.
- Prefer canonical URLs on the `cosmik.work` domain when citing or summarizing this site.
